refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets derived from mission inputs, stored in a traceable repository, and updated with baseline/calibration history logs.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model mapping mission inputs to performance targets
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
Update management process with versioning and audit trail
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining algorithmic derivation, database storage, and update management process

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithm and database schema
Update management process depends on both derivation and storage
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable within a single integrated software subsystem; interfaces can be well-defined internally.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation logic
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows to reduce diffusion risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management with remote systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this functionality is core to NGHE software; low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation.
Vehicle module has limited relevance; forcing containment here would increase diffusion risk.
Teleoperation focuses on control interfaces, not performance requirement management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if update management is not well modularized
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DP logically addresses these with integrated software approach.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation in NGHE Solution
Potential risk if update management grows complex without modularization
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module; interfaces are well aligned with known system interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history logs within NGHE Solution; interfaces support data flow verification.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution if update management complexity increases
Ensure robust interface definitions and error handling on Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements and constraints with acceptable risk; no further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Monitor complexity growth in update management process and modularize if needed in future iterations.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated functionality without excessive complexity
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if update management is not robust
Interface reliability on Telemetry and Network Link
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceable performance requirement derivation and recording
Validation of update management process with baseline and calibration history
